title: Korean Mandu with Charred Vegetable Filling
description: A recipe for Korean-style steamed dumplings filled with a flavorful charred vegetable mixture. Serve as a snack or side dish.
instructions: Prepare the charred vegetable filling by chopping the vegetables and mixing with soy sauce, garlic, and sesame oil.
Steam the mandu wrappers according to package instructions.
Place a mandu wrapper on a flat surface and brush with shortening.
Place a tablespoon of charred vegetable filling in the center of the wrapper.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle and press the edges together to seal.
Steam the mandu for 10-12 minutes or until cooked through.
Serve hot with sesame oil and green onions.
